# Pulse — Remote Claude Agent Manager

> Deploy, monitor, and control multiple Claude Code agents on your remote server through a real-time web dashboard.

## What is Pulse?

Pulse is a self-hosted web application that provides a browser-based dashboard for managing Claude Code AI agents running on a remote server. It eliminates the need to SSH into your server to start, stop, or monitor agents.

## Key Features

- **Multi-Agent Management**: Run multiple Claude agents simultaneously, each with its own model (Haiku, Sonnet, Opus), permissions, and system prompt.
- **Real-time Split-View Terminals**: Watch agent output as it streams via xterm.js. View two terminals side-by-side.
- **One-Click Deploy**: Spin up new agents instantly with pre-configured models, permission modes, and custom instructions.
- **Live Monitoring**: Track context window usage, elapsed time, and agent status (running, waiting, stopped) in real-time.
- **Secure Authentication**: OAuth token import from Claude CLI, API key support, and admin password protection with JWT cookies.
- **Mobile-Friendly**: Responsive design with slide-out sidebar drawer for mobile devices.

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend**: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Vite, xterm.js, Framer Motion
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express, Socket.IO, Drizzle ORM, SQLite
- **Infrastructure**: tmux for terminal sessions, systemd for daemon management

## Installation

```
npx pulse-agent-manager
```

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/JohnPitter/pulse
